common.name: Name
common.nameAndCmdRequired: Name and update command are required
common.dayHint: 1–28 (days 29–31 do not exist in every month)

login.errorShort: Password must be at least 12 characters.
login.totpHint: Enter the current code from your authenticator app.
login.hint: Set a password to protect access.

dash.title: Dashboard
dash.noServersHint: Go to Servers to add your first server.

stub.title: Coming soon
stub.body: This view is scheduled for a later phase.

det.updatesHint: Apply available system updates via Ansible.
det.agentDescription: The Shipyard Agent runs directly on the server and reports system information (CPU, RAM, disk, OS) to Shipyard in real time — no SSH connection required. This is more efficient and faster than legacy SSH polling. Update checks (OS, Docker images, custom) still run via SSH.
det.agentUpdateHint: Updates only the runner script/version and restarts the agent service. URL, token, and mode stay unchanged.
det.agentConfigureHint: Re-applies the currently set Shipyard URL/CA and restarts the agent service.
det.agentRemoveConfirm: Remove agent now? Server will fall back to legacy polling.
det.agentCaPemPlaceholder: Leave empty for private IPs (192.168.x, 10.x …) — certificate is fetched automatically. Only fill in for public domains with a self-signed TLS certificate.
det.noContainersHint: Docker or Podman is not installed or has no containers.
det.noCustomTasks: No custom update tasks configured yet.
det.taskTypeScriptDesc: For tools without a GitHub release. Use the latest command to determine the newest version.
det.taskTypeGithubDesc: Fetches the latest release version from GitHub and compares it with the check command output.
det.taskTypeTriggerDesc: Runs a check command and flags an update when the output exactly matches the trigger output.
det.taskCheckCommandHint: (optional) SSH command that outputs the installed version, e.g. immich --version
det.taskCheckCommandHintTrigger: SSH command whose trimmed output is compared exactly to the trigger output.
det.taskLatestCommandHint: SSH command that outputs the newest available version, e.g. curl -s https://api.example.com/latest
det.taskTriggerOutputHint: Exact output that should mark the task as update available, e.g. AVAILABLE
det.taskUpdateCommandHint: (optional) Shell command or script URL (http/https is run as bash <(curl …))
det.taskUpdateCommandOptionalHint: Optional update command. Leave empty if this task should only monitor.
det.taskTriggerRequired: Check command and trigger output are required for this type
det.allUpToDate: All packages are up to date
det.confirmRemoveStack: Remove compose stack "{{name}}" from Shipyard? This only removes the record — files on the server are not deleted.

ob.welcomeDesc: Shipyard helps you centrally monitor Linux servers, apply updates and manage Docker containers — all via Ansible and SSH.
ob.setupHelper: This wizard will guide you through the initial setup in a few steps.
ob.passwordHint: Choose a username and a secure password.
ob.usernameInvalid: Username may only contain letters, numbers, _ and -.
ob.appearanceHint: Optional — you can change everything anytime in Settings.
ob.sshDesc: Shipyard needs an SSH key to connect to your servers.
ob.noKey: No SSH key found. Please generate one.
ob.doneDesc: Shipyard is configured. You can now add your first servers.

set.brandingDesc: Customize your installation's name, color and icon.
set.agentEnabledHint: Show agent management UI and endpoints.
set.usersDesc: Manage who can sign in to Shipyard.
set.pollingDesc: How often Shipyard refreshes server state in the background.
set.dangerDesc: Destructive operations. There is no undo.
set.resetConfirm: Really delete all {{what}}? This cannot be undone.

reset.serversDesc: Delete all server entries and their cached data.
reset.schedulesDesc: Delete every schedule and history entry.

set.title: Admin
set.subtitle: Configure SSH key, Ansible and appearance
set.themeHint: Light, Dark or automatic via OS
set.webhookSecretHint: Optional: Bearer token for generic webhooks
set.smtpToHint: Separate multiple recipients with a comma
set.accentColorHint: Primary color for buttons and highlights
set.sshDistributeAllHint: Uses each server's stored SSH user/port with the entered password.
set.sshDeployAllConfirm: Really distribute SSH key to all servers?
set.exportKeyHint: Optional passphrase to protect the private key. Leave empty for an unprotected export.
set.importKeyHint: If the private key is passphrase-protected, enter the passphrase here.
set.agentFeatureHint: The agent collects system information (CPU, RAM, disk, OS) directly on the server — faster and without SSH. For small environments, SSH polling is sufficient.
set.agentFeatureSaved: Agent setting saved. Reload the page to see changes.
set.pollingHint: Shipyard connects via SSH to check for available updates. System information (CPU, RAM, disk) is also fetched via SSH unless an agent is installed — servers with an agent report this data directly instead.
set.pollOsUpdatesHint: Check for available package updates (apt) — nothing is installed
set.pollImageUpdatesHint: Check Docker/Podman images for new versions — no automatic pull
set.pollCustomUpdatesHint: Query GitHub releases & run check commands — nothing is executed
set.totpHint: TOTP via Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.
set.totpScanQR: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app:
set.delServersHint: Removes all servers, history, cache and container data
set.delPlaybooksHint: Removes all manually created playbooks (internal ones remain)
set.resetAuthHint: Deletes password and JWT secret — onboarding restarts
set.resetAllHint: Deletes all data, password and settings — full restart
set.confirmAuth: Really reset login? You will be signed out.
set.confirmAll: Really delete EVERYTHING? This cannot be undone.
set.toastPwSaved: Password saved — please sign in again
set.pwTooShort: New password must be at least 12 characters
set.pluginsHint: Plugins extend Shipyard with additional functionality. Place them in /app/plugins/<id>/.
set.pluginsEmpty: No plugins found. Place a plugin directory under /app/plugins/.
set.pluginsWarningText: Plugins run as Node.js code on the server with full access to SSH, the database, and the network. Only install plugins from trusted sources.
set.pluginsEnableWarning: Enable plugin {{name}}? Plugins run with full server privileges. Only enable plugins from trusted sources.
set.pluginsEnableWarningPost: Plugins run with full server privileges. Only enable plugins from trusted sources.
set.agentManifestHint: Defines collectors and interval for all agents.
set.sidebarIconHint: Show icon in the sidebar header
set.notificationEventsHint: Choose which failures trigger a notification. Notifications are sent only if webhook or email is configured above.
set.notifyPlaybookFailureHint: Notify when an Ansible playbook fails
set.notifyUpdateFailureHint: Notify when a system or bulk update fails
set.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 12 characters
set.deleteUserConfirm: Delete user "{{username}}"? This cannot be undone.
set.roleBuiltInHint: The built-in Admin and User roles cannot be changed.
set.noCustomRolesHint: Create one to restrict user access.

pb.targetHint: Use 'all' or a comma-separated list of hostnames/groups.
pb.title: Playbooks
pb.subtitle: Create, edit and run Ansible Playbooks
pb.selectHint: Select a playbook from the list on the left or create a new one.
pb.restoreConfirm: Restore this version? The current version will be saved as a backup.
pb.quickRunPlaceholder: Select a playbook and run it

sc.name: Name
sc.required: Please fill in all required fields

audit.title: Audit log
audit.empty: No audit entries match the filters

agent.manifestHint: Defines collectors and interval for all agents.

plugins.title: Plugins
plugins.noUi: Plugin has no UI (missing mount() export).
plugins.author: Author

dash.title: Dashboard
dash.noServersHint: Go to Servers to add your first server.

srv.title: Servers
srv.noServersHint: Add your first server to get started.
srv.runPlaybookHint: Run a playbook on {{count}} selected server(s)
srv.folderNote: Servers will not be deleted, only removed from the folder.
srv.cantMoveToChild: Cannot move folder into a subfolder
srv.noValidServers: No valid servers found in file
srv.resetHostKeyConfirmBody: Remove the stored SSH host key for this server?

add.name: Server Name
add.hostnameHint: Defaults to IP address if left empty
add.linksHint: Named URLs like Sonarr, Radarr, admin interfaces, or local dashboards.
add.storageMountsHint: Optional mount paths whose usage Shipyard should track separately.
add.sshKeyHint: Enter SSH password to automatically install the key.
add.dockerEnabledHint: Shows the Docker tab on this server. Auto-enabled when Docker or Podman is detected.

vars.title: Ansible Variables
vars.subtitle: Manage global variables for playbooks
vars.keyHint: Letters, numbers and _ (starts with letter or _)

git.title: Git Integration
git.subtitle: Version and sync your playbooks
git.setupHint: Playbooks will be stored in this repository. Synced automatically before every run.
git.authTokenHint: Personal Access Token (PAT) — not needed for SSH URLs. Stored securely.
git.authSshHint: SSH URLs automatically use the existing Shipyard SSH key.
git.disconnectConfirm: Disconnect Git? This will not delete your remote repository.

run.title: Run Playbook
run.excludeHint: When "All Servers" is enabled, checked servers are skipped.
run.includeHint: When "All Servers" is disabled, only checked servers are targeted.
run.confirmAllServersMessage: This playbook will run on all selected servers. Confirm only if that is really intended.
run.needTarget: Please specify at least one target server
run.invalidJson: Invalid JSON format in Extra Variables

compose.emptyError: Path and content must not be empty

api.sessionExpired: Session expired — please sign in again

profile.twoFactorDisableHint: Enter your current password to disable two-factor authentication.
